stem: Which Article of the Constitution of India says that: 'No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law'?
Out of a few people who participated in a race, Sandeep ranked 17th from the top and 17th from the bottom. How many persons participated in the race?

Which of the following interchanges in signs and numbers will make the given equation correct?
9 − 11 ÷ 24 = 75

As of July 2022, under the National Pension Scheme for Traders and Self-employed Persons, beneficiaries are entitled to receive minimum monthly assured pension of how much after attaining the age of 60 years?
Combustion of one unit area mole of nitric oxide gives ______ carbon dioxide and ______ water molecules, respectively.
The value of 84 ÷ 4 − 2 × 3 + 7 is:
In which Veda is the number of hymns (verses) the highest?

reason: Requires a geometric figure (quadrilateral ABCD with points D, E and diagonal AC and BD) not expressible in text.

stem: Researchers at IIT Guwahati have developed a 'smart' window material in May 2021. What is the use of this material?
options: It increases the life of medical oxygen cylinders.
It locates sources of faint light from distant quasars.
It allows automatic climate control of buildings.
It maintains oxygen pressure that works without electricity.

stem: River ______ flows through the Malwa Plateau.
In a certain code language, 'ANGLE' is written as 'CQRQK' and 'BEING' is written as 'DFINSM'. How will 'BROKE' be written in that language?

What will come in the place of the question mark (?) in the following equation if '+' and '−' are interchanged and also '×' and '÷' are interchanged?
28 − 168 × 4 + 10 ÷ 2 = ?
Which of the following elements is most metallic in nature?
The value of (20 + 20 tan²A) / (50 + 50 cot²A) is:
Which of the following statements about ozone is correct? Choose the right option.
options: Its excessive amount is not harmful, which causes the death of aquatic animals.
It reduces the effect of this climate change.
Its judicious use also increases air pollution.

stem: A and B start moving at the same time towards each other from points X and Y, respectively. After meeting on the way, A and B take 5.4 hours and p hours, respectively to reach Y and X, respectively. If the speed of B is 50% more than that of A, then what is the value of p?

Select the set in which the numbers are related in the same way as are the numbers of the following sets.
(NOTE : Operations should be performed on the whole numbers, without breaking down the numbers into its constituent digits. E.g. 13 − Operations on 13 such as adding/deleting/multiplying etc. to 13 can be performed. Breaking down 13 into 1 and 3 and then performing mathematical operation on 1 and 3 is not allowed)
(15, 56)
(44, 85)
The direction of the current in a coil of a motor is reversed by:
Which of the following pairs will be in the same homologous series?
If 1.6 : 0.6 :: 0.6 : x, find the value of x.

Amongst six friends A, B, C, D, E and F, each has a different height. A is taller than only three other friends. D is taller than only one friend. C is taller than D but shorter than F. Who is the second tallest among all the friends?
A concave mirror is made from a section of the surface of a sphere of radius 18.0 cm. According to New Cartesian Sign Convention, its principal focus is located at x = ______.

P, Q, R, S, T, U, V and W are sitting around a square table facing the centre of the table. Some of them are sitting at the corners, while some are sitting in the middle of the sides. R sits third to the left of W. R sits at one of the corners. T does not sit at the corner. V sits second to the right of T. S is not an immediate neighbour of W. S does not sit at any of the middle of the sides. Who sits second to the left of V?
For a regular polygon, the sum of the interior angles is 200% more than the sum of its exterior angles. Each interior angle of the polygon measures x°. What is the value of x°?
______, the first 'made in India' Petascale supercomputer that was deployed at IIT Roorkee in March 2022, has a supercomputing capacity of 1.66 PetaFlops.

In a code language, 'let's cook dinner' is written as 'li mu ha', 'dinner is over' is written as 'ha ve ka', and 'let's go out' is written as 'mu pa so'. What is the code for the word 'cook' in that language?
According to India State Forest Survey Report 2021, the forest cover in India is ______ of the geographical area of the country.
Which of the following organisms has a three chambered heart?
Who among the following holds the record of presenting the maximum number of budgets in the history of independent India by presenting 10 budgets during his time in union finance minister?
